title: Simply the best
author: Magic-Mike-2023
selftext:
Hey guys! Happy Friday :)
If anyone is struggling with picking stocks during current uncertain times, I want you to pay attention to dividend paying stocks like MPLX, ET, T, MO. They all have strong fundamentals and steadily growing business,  especially MPLX. 
Im sure you know that when people panic, they usually sell volatile, more speculative tech, pharma stocks first, but not touching the ones that generate steady dividend income.
In case you need some insights on what stocks to look at on weekly basis, check - [Cash Flow 50](https://builder.limex.com/dashboard/101131) strategy. Pure Cash generating portfolio without hight volatility. Updates every Monday.

I also created Cyclical Barbel strategy. So once this chaos will be over, that one will outperform the market in no time. If you want I can share it too.

Enjoy your weekend! Peace ✌️
